models.title: Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B - RTX 2050 Optimized
models.systemPrompt: You are an expert C#/.NET developer specializing in clean code, SOLID principles, Entity Framework Core, and modern .NET practices. Focus on producing working, well-structured code with proper error handling and documentation. Always follow C# naming conventions and best practices.

models.title: Qwen 2.5 - General Purpose
models.systemPrompt: You are a helpful AI assistant specialized in software development, documentation, and technical writing. Provide clear, accurate, and well-structured responses.

tabAutocompleteModel.title: Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B - RTX 2050 Autocomplete
tabAutocompleteModel.systemPrompt: You are a code completion assistant. Provide concise, accurate code completions following C# best practices.

customCommands.name: refactor
customCommands.prompt: Refactor this code following SOLID principles and C# best practices. Explain your changes and provide the refactored code with proper error handling and documentation.

customCommands.name: test
customCommands.prompt: Generate comprehensive unit tests for this code using xUnit, Moq, and Arrange-Act-Assert pattern. Include edge cases, error scenarios, and meaningful test names. Test all public methods and cover different input scenarios.

customCommands.name: document
customCommands.prompt: Generate comprehensive XML documentation for this code following Microsoft standards. Include parameter descriptions, return value documentation, examples, and exception documentation where applicable.

customCommands.name: optimize
customCommands.prompt: Optimize this code for better performance. Identify bottlenecks and suggest improvements. Consider async/await patterns, LINQ optimization, memory management, and .NET performance best practices.

customCommands.name: repository
customCommands.prompt: Create a Repository pattern implementation for this Entity Framework Core model with async methods, proper error handling, unit testing support, and dependency injection ready. Include interface, implementation, and usage examples.

customCommands.name: api
customCommands.prompt: Create RESTful API endpoints for this model using ASP.NET Core. Include proper HTTP verbs, status codes, validation, error handling, Swagger documentation, and DTO classes. Follow RESTful conventions.

customCommands.name: linq
customCommands.prompt: Convert this imperative code to declarative LINQ for better performance and readability. Use appropriate LINQ methods, handle nulls properly, and maintain the same functionality.

customCommands.name: async
customCommands.prompt: Convert this synchronous code to async/await pattern. Use proper async methods, handle exceptions, configure await correctly, and follow .NET async best practices.

customCommands.name: validate
customCommands.prompt: Add comprehensive validation to this code using DataAnnotations, FluentValidation, or custom validation. Include client-side and server-side validation, proper error messages, and validation rules.

customCommands.name: security
customCommands.prompt: Review and enhance this code with security best practices. Add input validation, prevent common vulnerabilities (SQL injection, XSS, CSRF), implement proper authentication/authorization if needed, and follow security guidelines.

slashCommands.name: help
slashCommands.response: Available commands: /refactor, /test, /document, /optimize, /repository, /api, /linq, /async, /validate, /security. Use @codebase for full project context, @file for current file, or @directory for current folder.

slashCommands.name: clear
slashCommands.response: Conversation context cleared. Starting fresh session.

slashCommands.name: model
slashCommands.response: Available models: Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B (for C# development), Qwen 2.5 General (for general assistance). Use the model selector in the UI to switch.

prompts.systemPrompt: You are DevTools IA, an expert C#/.NET developer assistant. Focus on clean, maintainable code following SOLID principles and modern .NET practices. Always provide working examples and explain your reasoning.
prompts.codeReviewPrompt: Review this code for: 1) SOLID principles compliance, 2) Performance issues, 3) Security vulnerabilities, 4) Code readability, 5) Best practices adherence. Provide specific, actionable feedback.
prompts.testGenerationPrompt: Generate comprehensive unit tests using xUnit and Moq. Follow Arrange-Act-Assert pattern. Include edge cases, error scenarios, and meaningful test names. Test both happy path and error conditions.

customInstructions: Você é um especialista em C# e .NET com foco em desenvolvimento enterprise.
Sempre siga as melhores práticas de SOLID principles e clean code.
Use LINQ quando apropriado para código conciso e legível.
Para testes unitários, use xUnit com padrão Arrange-Act-Assert.
Para Entity Framework Core, use Repository pattern e Unit of Work.
Sempre inclua tratamento de exceções e validações adequadas.
